title: feuilleea chartacea
intro: Feuilleea chartacea, also known as the 'Lion's Tail', is a tropical plant native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The health benefits of Feuilleea chartacea include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Feuilleea chartacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
